summary: PHANTOM API: git-status.ts calls window.api.getGitStatus() which is NOT exposed in preload ElectronAPI — always fails silently
ORPHANED CHANNEL: EVENT_EXPLAIN defined in ipc-channels and contract but has NO ipcMain.handle handler — will fail if wired to preload
UNREACHABLE HANDLER: GET_CAPABILITIES registered with ipcMain.handle but NOT exposed in preload window.api — unreachable from renderer
